title: Jetic Cluster
description: A Cluster represents a connected Kubernetes cluster with the Camel Bridge operator installed, serving as a deployment target for integrations.

camelBridgeStatus.description: Status of the Camel Bridge operator on this cluster.

kubernetesVersion.description: Kubernetes version running on the cluster.

deploymentCount.description: Number of active deployments on this cluster.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cluster was registered.
